determining the biggest area likely needs visual/geometric reasoning rather than direct text lookup
verifiability: answer_type is option/choice with a single recorded answer 'E'
the target claim is objectively checkable from the image by area comparison

risk_flags: answer is only an option label, so reasoning-path verification depends on access to the image
visual geometry details are not present in the text alone

the sample has high image dependency but the required image asset exists, so the core semantics are preserved
